title: Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) Misses Q3 EPS by 9c
text: Marathon Digital Holdings missed Q3 2024 EPS expectations. The company reported Q3 EPS of negative $0.42, approximately $0.09 worse than the analyst estimate of negative $0.33. Revenue for the quarter came in at $131.65 million versus consensus estimate of $142.69 million, missing by 11.13%. The earnings miss reflected challenging market conditions for bitcoin mining with increased difficulty and competitive pressures. Despite the miss, the company continued capital investments to achieve longer-term growth targets.
